title: Quality pass: clippy pedantic cleanup in crossbridge-supervisor
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Run cargo clippy -p crossbridge-supervisor with -W clippy::pedantic and resolve all 18 warnings. Top categories: cast_possible_truncation, missing_errors_doc, semicolon_if_nothing_returned, match_wild_err_arm, used_underscore_binding.

Acceptance criteria:
- cargo clippy -p crossbridge-supervisor --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings exits 0.
- No blanket #[allow] over whole modules — fix the underlying issues; only allow specific lints with a one-line justification.
- All existing tests still pass (cargo test -p crossbridge-supervisor).
- cargo fmt --check clean.
